title: REAL Q4 2025 Earnings Report on 2/26/2026
text: The RealReal reported Q4 2025 earnings per share (EPS) of $0.06, doubling the forecasted $0.03. The company exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $194 million against an anticipated $190.62 million. Revenue grew 18% year-over-year. The company delivered $616 million in GMV for the quarter, representing 22% growth. Adjusted EBITDA margin reached 11%. During the fourth quarter, the company surpassed the $2 billion mark in GMV for the year. The company delivered 450 basis points of Adjusted EBITDA margin expansion. Free cash flow of $43 million was generated in Q4, up $23 million year-over-year. The company met its goal of exiting 2025 with 35% of all units fully flowing through Athena, a key contributor to the strong leverage delivered in the quarter. Active buyer growth accelerated in Q4 to 9% on a trailing twelve-month basis. Adjusted EBITDA margin is projected to expand by nearly 200 basis points versus 2025 by 2026's midpoint guidance.
